ticket.title: TRANSACTIONS TABLE SHOW ITEMS DROPDOWN BUG

test_cases.description: Verify Show Items dropdown displays all expected transaction records, including B2B partner markup entries.
test_cases.expected_result: All transaction records, including markup entries, should appear in the dropdown.
test_cases.actual_result: All records, including B2B partner markup entries, now display correctly after the fix.
test_cases.comments: Root cause: creditBalance.js filter excluded markup-type transactions for a specific agent ID after duplication from B2B markup additions.

test_cases.description: Verify duplicate markup entries no longer appear in the dropdown after the fix.
test_cases.expected_result: Markup entries should appear only once per transaction, with no duplicates.
test_cases.actual_result: No duplicate markup entries found; duplicates were removed as part of the fix.
test_cases.comments: Duplicate markup entries removed as part of the fix.

test_cases.description: Verify dropdown displays correctly for an agent with no markup transactions (edge case).
test_cases.expected_result: Dropdown should show only standard transactions with no errors for agents without markups.
test_cases.actual_result: Dropdown displayed correctly with no markup entries, as expected.

test_cases.description: Verify dropdown displays correctly for an agent with multiple markup entries (edge case).
test_cases.expected_result: All markup entries for the agent should display correctly without omission.
test_cases.actual_result: All markup entries displayed correctly for the multi-markup agent.

test_cases.description: Verify the previously affected agent ID's markup transactions now appear correctly after the creditBalance.js filter correction.
test_cases.expected_result: Previously affected agent ID's markup transactions should now be visible in the dropdown.
test_cases.actual_result: Confirmed deployed and working; affected agent ID's transactions now visible.
